title: verilator segfaults on incorrect code
body:
---


Author Name: **Johan Bjork**
Original Redmine Issue: 1144 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Found this while searching for another issue.

```
module t (clk);
    input clk;
     always @(posedge clk) begin
         $display("baz: %d\n", baz);
     end

endmodule

```
